GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_returnflag], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=22369621
    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_returnflag@0], 8), input_partitions=8
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_returnflag], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=22369621
--- memory ---
GpuAggregateExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
    GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
        GpuScanExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
